name: Flumazenil
description: Fumazenil is an imidazobenzodiazepine derivative and a potent benzodiazepine receptor antagonist that competitively inhibits the activity at the benzodiazepine recognition site on the GABA/benzodiazepine receptor complex, thereby reversing the effects of benzodiazepine on the central nervous system.
indication: For the complete or partial reversal of the sedative effects of benzodiazepines in cases where general anesthesia has been induced and/or maintained with benzodiazepines, and where sedation has been produced with benzodiazepines for diagnostic and therapeutic procedures. Also for the management of benzodiazepine overdose as an adjunct for appropriate supportive and symptomatic measures.
toxicity: In clinical studies, most adverse reactions to flumazenil were an extension of the pharmacologic effects of the drug in reversing benzodiazepine effects.
mechanismOfAction: Flumazenil, an imidazobenzodiazepine derivative, antagonizes the actions of benzodiazepines on the central nervous system. Flumazenil competitively inhibits the activity at the benzodiazepine recognition site on the GABA/benzodiazepine receptor complex. Flumazenil is a weak partial agonist in some animal models of activity, but has little or no agonist activity in man.
pharmacodynamics: Flumazenil antagonizes the CNS effects produced by benzodiazepines, but does not antagonize the central nervous system effects of drugs affecting GABA-ergic neurons by means other than the benzodiazepine receptor (including ethanol, barbiturates, or general anesthetics) and does not reverse the effects of opioids.

interactions.name: Methadone
interactions.description: Flumazenil may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Methadone.

interactions.name: Olanzapine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Flumazenil is combined with Olanzapine.

interactions.name: Sodium oxybate
interactions.description: Flumazenil may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Sodium oxybate.

interactions.name: Hyaluronidase
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Flumazenil can be decreased when used in combination with Hyaluronidase.

interactions.name: Clozapine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Flumazenil is combined with Clozapine.

interactions.name: Ambroxol acefyllinate
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Flumazenil can be decreased when used in combination with Ambroxol acefyllinate.

interactions.name: Theophylline
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Flumazenil can be decreased when used in combination with Theophylline.

interactions.name: Dyphylline
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Flumazenil can be decreased when used in combination with Dyphylline.

interactions.name: Aminophylline
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Flumazenil can be decreased when used in combination with Aminophylline.

interactions.name: Eszopiclone
interactions.description: Flumazenil may decrease the sedative activities of Eszopiclone.

interactions.name: Zolpidem
interactions.description: Flumazenil may decrease the sedative activities of Zolpidem.

interactions.name: Zaleplon
interactions.description: Flumazenil may decrease the sedative activities of Zaleplon.

interactions.name: Ramelteon
interactions.description: Flumazenil may decrease the sedative activities of Ramelteon.

interactions.name: Zopiclone
interactions.description: Flumazenil may decrease the sedative activities of Zopiclone.

interactions.name: Suvorexant
interactions.description: Flumazenil may decrease the sedative activities of Suvorexant.

interactions.name: Tasimelteon
interactions.description: Flumazenil may decrease the sedative activities of Tasimelteon.

interactions.name: Fosphenytoin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Fosphenytoin can be increased when it is combined with Flumazenil.

interactions.name: Phenytoin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Phenytoin can be increased when it is combined with Flumazenil.

interactions.name: Teduglutide
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Flumazenil can be increased when it is combined with Teduglutide.
